summary: Tested Role Hierarchy & Order Duplication features for RX Expresss. All 20 backend API tests pass. Frontend features working correctly including Users page with Permissions modal, Orders page with Create Order and Duplicate functionality, and sidebar permission filtering for Manager/Operator roles.
critical_code_review_comments: Role hierarchy correctly implemented: Admin > Manager > Operator > Pharmacy > Driver
Patient role successfully removed from system
POST /api/auth/login correctly returns permissions array (Admin gets all 28, Manager gets assigned perms, Operator gets limited perms)
GET /api/admin/permissions/available returns all 28 permissions grouped by 13 categories
PUT /api/admin/permissions/user/{userId} updates user's permissions with proper authorization checks
POST /api/admin/orders/create creates order with pharmacy dropdown and generates QR code based on city
POST /api/admin/orders/{id}/log-attempt logs failed attempt, returns canDuplicate=true after 2 fails
POST /api/admin/orders/{id}/duplicate creates duplicate with new QR code and labour cost
GET /api/admin/orders/{id}/history returns full attempt chain with all duplicates and logs
Frontend Users page shows Manager/Operator roles with Permissions button
Frontend Permission modal shows checkboxes grouped by category (28 permissions in 13 categories)
Frontend Orders page has Create Order button with pharmacy dropdown modal
Frontend Order detail shows Attempt History button and Duplicate button for failed orders
Frontend Sidebar correctly hides items based on user permissions (Operator sees 5 items, Manager sees all 13)
seed_data_creation: Manager and Operator test users seeded with permissions. Manager has all 28 permissions, Operator has 8 permissions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Role hierarchy and order duplication features fully implemented and tested. Manager and Operator now redirect to Admin panel on login (fixed in Login.cshtml). Sidebar filtering works based on user permissions stored in localStorage. Operator sees 5 sidebar items (Overview, Drivers, Orders, Routes, Pricing), Manager sees all 13 items. Order duplication creates new order with new QR code and links to parent via ParentOrderId. Attempt history shows full chain of orders and logs.

evidence: Manager gets assigned permissions from DB
Operator gets limited permissions from DB
Returns all permissions grouped by category
13 categories: Orders, Routes, Drivers, Tracking, Pharmacies, Users, Pricing, Scanning, Zones, Offices, API Keys, Reports
Returns userId, name, role, permissions array
QR code prefix based on city (B for Brooklyn, Q for Queens, M for Manhattan)
Creates duplicate with new QR code
Returns orders array with all duplicates
Returns logs array with all attempt logs
Role filter dropdown shows Admin, Manager, Operator, Pharmacy, Driver
Permissions button visible for Manager and Operator users
Permissions modal shows 28 checkboxes grouped by category
All form fields present (name, phone, street, city, state, zip, type, copay, notes, refrigerated)
Duplicate Order button visible for failed orders
Duplicate modal shows labour cost input
History modal shows order chain and logs
Manager sees all 13 sidebar items (has all permissions)
Operator sees 5 sidebar items (Overview, Drivers, Orders, Routes, Pricing)
8 items hidden for Operator (Users, Pharmacies, Live Tracking, QR Scanning, Service Zones, Office Locations, API Keys, Reports)

api_endpoints_tested: POST /api/auth/login (admin, manager, operator, pharmacy, driver) - PASS
ui_flows_tested: Admin login and redirect to Admin panel
Manager login and redirect to Admin panel
Operator login and redirect to Admin panel
Users page with role filter and Permissions button
Permissions modal with checkboxes grouped by category
Orders page with Create Order button
Create Order modal with pharmacy dropdown
Order detail modal with QR code, History, and Duplicate buttons
Duplicate Order modal with labour cost input
Sidebar filtering based on user permissions

bug_fixes_applied.issue: Manager and Operator were redirected to non-existent /Manager/Index and /Operator/Index pages
bug_fixes_applied.fix: Added getRedirectPath() function to redirect Admin, Manager, and Operator to /Admin/Index
